name: Sunken
description: Recessed wells pressed into the surface, re-inking the floor on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); box-shadow: inset calc(-14px / @Y) calc(-14px / @Y) calc(26px / @Y) rgba(255,255,255,0.28), inset calc(14px / @Y) calc(14px / @Y) calc(26px / @Y) rgba(0,0,0,0.42); } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
